goal: Disposable dogfood drill proving manager nudges session-bound workers with session-nudge after the legacy fallback fix.

acceptance_criteria: Manager uses session-nudge to request the worker proof artifact.
Worker creates only .codex-workers/qa-nudge-fallback-worker/manager-nudge-proof.txt and reports git status.
Manager verifies evidence via capture, status or replay before finishing.
guidelines: Use scripts/workerctl cycle qa-nudge-fallback-drill before acting.
Use scripts/workerctl session-nudge qa-nudge-fallback-worker for worker communication; do not choose legacy nudge first.
Do not edit tracked files; this is a QA supervision drill.
manager_config.objective: Supervise a low-risk nudge fallback dogfood drill. Verify the worker waits for manager instruction, nudge with session-nudge, inspect evidence, and finish only with a clean receipt.

name: qa-nudge-fallback-drill
summary: Low-risk QA drill: worker only writes ignored artifacts under .codex-workers; manager must inspect evidence and nudge through session commands.
